name: python-builder/SKILL.md
overview: Generates general Python backend logic and services
keywords: class, function, python, api, backend, service
trigger: request to create or modify Python backend classes, endpoints, or scripts
exclusion: data analysis or distributed pipelines requested

name: data-analysis-builder/SKILL.md
overview: Processes data and generates Pandas/Polars scripts
keywords: pandas, polars, dataframe, cleaning, aggregation, analysis
trigger: request to analyze, clean, transform, or aggregate datasets using Python
exclusion: general web backend or distributed Spark pipelines requested

name: data-pipeline-builder/SKILL.md
overview: Creates batch/streaming ETL pipelines and Airflow DAGs
keywords: etl, pipeline, airflow, dag, prefect, batch, ingestion
trigger: request to build data ingestion, sync tasks, scheduler flows, or ETL pipelines
exclusion: ad-hoc analysis or non-batch backend tasks requested

name: big-data-builder/SKILL.md
overview: Optimizes distributed PySpark and large SQL queries
keywords: spark, pyspark, partition, bucketing, sql query, distributed
trigger: request to process massive data (>10GB), tune SQL performance, or write PySpark tasks
exclusion: small datasets (<10GB) or simple local scripts requested

name: data-modeling-builder/SKILL.md
overview: Designs database tables and SQLAlchemy/Pydantic schemas
keywords: orm, sqlalchemy, sqlmodel, pydantic, ddl, migration, database
trigger: request to design schemas, write ORM entities, or create Pydantic validation models
exclusion: writing business logic or ETL pipeline control scripts

name: test-builder/SKILL.md
overview: Generates unit and integration pytest test suites
keywords: pytest, test, mock, fixture, conftest, coverage
trigger: request to write tests, create fixtures, or increase code coverage

name: python-run-linter/SKILL.md
overview: Runs Ruff and Black to format and validate code style
keywords: lint, format, ruff, black, pep8, syntax
trigger: request to format Python files or check code styling rules

name: test-run-pytest/SKILL.md
overview: Runs Pytest test suite and checks coverage
keywords: run test, execute pytest, coverage check
trigger: request to run tests, check if tests pass, or verify code coverage

name: data-check-quality/SKILL.md
overview: Checks dataframes for schema drift and null ratio anomalies
keywords: check data, validate dataframe, schema drift, quality check
trigger: request to inspect dataframe quality, check for nulls, or validate dataframes
